name: Sunset Zine
description: Warm peach paper backdrop with a magenta accent and chunky Fraunces serif. Indie magazine / risograph zine vibe — playful, expressive, character-forward.
descriptionZh: 暖蜗色纸底 + 玫红强调色 + 厚体 Fraunces serif. 独立杂志 / 丝网印 zine 风, 俏皮有人情味.
motionHints: 丝网印套色错位、手写 brush 划掉、俏皮 stagger、轻微 wiggle；松弛、有人味。**禁**企业风、严肃报头、技术蓝图感
